redisUrl.description: Redis connection URL for MemDir (default: redis://localhost:6379)

memDirTimeoutMs.description: Bounded timeout for MemDir reads in milliseconds (default: 5000)

memDirConsecutiveTimeoutThreshold.description: Number of consecutive MemDir timeouts before halt protocol fires (default: 3)

haltNotificationCooldownMs.description: Cooldown between halt notifications in milliseconds (default: 60000)

journalDir.description: Directory for JSONL decision journal files (default: {stateDir}/training/trades)
